name: io.github.chrischall/gogcli-mcp-slides
description: Google Slides via gogcli for Claude — deck and slide authoring

environmentVariables.name: GOG_ACCOUNT
environmentVariables.description: Email address of the Google account to use (matches gogcli auth)

environmentVariables.name: GOG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override path to the gogcli binary (auto-discovered otherwise)
